name: callbell
description: Lazy senior mode for code and knowledge repos: adaptive skills, rules, and an always-on context loader.

interface.shortDescription: Lazy senior mode for code and knowledge repos
interface.longDescription: The interface between you and the agent: shared norms, a scaffold for backlog and memory, filing, import, planning, and git. /callbell:start is the way in — it checks what a folder is missing and lays it down.
defaultPrompt: Set up this project with callbell.
